MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay ; Clerk: K. Liu ; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Tenderloin Neighborhood Development Corp. is present. Represented by Monica Henderson.
Attorney Michael Rossoff appearing for plaintiff.
Defendant Christina Hernandez is present.
Attorney Nathan Mee representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Mark Schriber, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. The trial date of April 15, 2013 vacated. (501/JPT)
